name: ASRock B650M Pro RS WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E + Bluetooth
shortName: ASRock B650M Pro RS WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support, WiFi 6E, and PCIe 4.0 connectivity.
